name: Kasespatzle (Spaetzle Cheese Noodles)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add onions and brown lightly.
3. In a separate bowl, mix cheese with dry mustard until combined.
4. Toss the cooked noodles into the onion mixture along with the cheese mixture. Stir well to combine all ingredients evenly.
5. Transfer the mixture to an ovenproof casserole dish.
6. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 30 minutes, or until hot and bubbly throughout.
7. Before serving, sprinkle chopped chives over the top of the casserole.
